title: React Basics
description: Fundamental React concepts for building component-based interfaces.

questions.prompt: Which hook is commonly used for local component state?
questions.explanation: useState stores local component state and provides a setter.

questions.prompt: Which values can cause a component to render again?
questions.explanation: State, props, and consumed context participate in React rendering. A plain local variable does not.
Returning null tells React to render nothing for that component.

questions.prompt: What identifies list items so React can match them between renders?
questions.explanation: A stable key lets React identify items when a list changes.

questions.prompt: Which statements about props are correct?
options: They are inputs to a component
They should be mutated by the child
questions.explanation: Props are read-only inputs and can contain values such as callbacks and React nodes.
